# Dr Lolo Cosmetics

Dr Lolo Cosmetics is a Tanzanian beauty and cosmetics brand offering skincare, body care, glow products, oils, serums, creams, soaps, and beauty sets. The brand is founded by Ritha and operates from Kariakoo, Dar es Salaam, Tanzania.

## Website

- URL: https://www.drlolocosmetics.com
- Contact: +255 766 776 642
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/255766776642
- Address: Kariakoo, Dar es Salaam, Mafia and Jangwani Street
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/drlolo_product
- TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@drlolo_product
- Threads: https://threads.net/drlolo_product

## Product Collections

### 1. Rapid Glow Collection
- Rapid Glow Serum
- Rapid Glow Body Lotion
- Rapid Glow Face Cream
- Rapid Glow Oil / Whitening Oil
- Rapid Glow Soap
- Rapid Glow Full Set

### 2. Telesa Pink Glow Collection
- Telesa Pink Glow Serum
- Telesa Pink Glow Whitening Face Cream
- Telesa Pink Glow Body Cream
- Telesa Pink Glow Full Set

### 3. Miranda / Mirandy Glow Collection
- Miranda Glow Lotion
- Miranda Glow Advance Serum
- Mirandy Glow Whitening Face Cream
- Mirandy Glow Glutathione Drip / Super Whitening Product
- Miranda Glow Full Set

### 4. Marina Glow Gold Collection
- Marina Glow Gold 24K Shower Gel
- Marina Glow Serum
- Marina Glow Whitening Face Cream
- Marina Glow Gold Full Set

### 5. Evert Glow Collection
- Evert Glow Super Whiten
- Evert Glow Soap / Cream Product
- Evert Glow Skin Care Box Product

### 6. Rana Slim / Rana Slimming
- Rana Slim Fruit Vegetable Fiber Enzyme Powder
- Rana Slimming Powder
- Rana Slim Supplement Product

## Categories

- Glow Collections: Rapid Glow, Pink Glow, Marina Gold, Miranda Glow, Evert Glow
- Face Care: Face creams, serums, soaps, acne/dark spot products
- Body Care: Lotions, shower gels, body creams, oils
- Beauty Sets: Full skincare and glow sets
- Specialty Products: Rana Slim, slimming powder, selected wellness/beauty products
